acceptance_dimensions.name: section_completeness
acceptance_dimensions.description: Every section in the Structure Architect's approved outline is written; no [MATERIAL GAP] placeholders remain unresolved at handoff to citation_compliance.

acceptance_dimensions.name: citation_density
acceptance_dimensions.description: Every factual claim carries at least one citation; uncited claims either gain a source or are rewritten with hedging language.

acceptance_dimensions.name: argument_blueprint_fidelity
acceptance_dimensions.description: Each section follows the CER chains delivered by argument_builder_agent (the Argument Blueprint runtime artefact); topic sentences match the claim, evidence cites assigned sources, and explanation links back to the section purpose. The Argument Blueprint, not the contract, is the source of CER chains.

acceptance_dimensions.name: total_word_count
acceptance_dimensions.description: Final draft total stays within plus or minus 10 percent of the target declared in the Paper Configuration Record.

acceptance_dimensions.name: per_section_word_count
acceptance_dimensions.description: Each section stays within plus or minus 15 percent of the per-section allocation declared in the Paper Configuration Record.

acceptance_dimensions.name: paragraph_structure
acceptance_dimensions.description: At least 80 percent of body paragraphs follow TEEL (Topic / Evidence / Explanation / Link); inter-section transitions present. Introduction-first and conclusion-last paragraphs are exempt.

acceptance_dimensions.name: register_consistency
acceptance_dimensions.description: Academic register holds throughout; no colloquial mixing; discipline-appropriate phrasing per the Paper Configuration Record.
